title: aeschynomene rosei
intro: Aeschynomene rosei, also known as the African sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Aeschynomene rosei include its antimalarial and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat malaria, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aeschynomene rosei can be prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, or used in the form of infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
